name: notes.read
title: Read Note
description: Read a note from the vault with parsed metadata.

name: notes.create
title: Create Note
description: Create a new note using filesystem-first behavior.

name: notes.update
title: Update Note
description: Update an existing note, replacing or appending content.

name: notes.delete
title: Delete Note
description: Delete a note from the vault.

name: notes.search
title: Search Notes
description: Search notes by text with lightweight support for tag: and path: filters.

name: notes.searchByDate
title: Search Notes By Date
description: List notes by created or modified date.

name: notes.list
title: List Notes
description: List notes in the vault or a folder.

name: notes.listFolders
title: List Folders
description: List folders in the vault.

name: notes.move
title: Move Note
description: Move a note and optionally update links that reference it.

name: notes.createFolder
title: Create Folder
description: Create a folder in the vault.

name: notes.moveFolder
title: Move Folder
description: Move a folder and optionally update links inside the vault.

name: notes.info
title: Note Info
description: Get note metadata and lightweight statistics without loading the result into a client-specific schema.

name: notes.insertAfterHeading
title: Insert After Heading
description: Insert content immediately after a markdown heading.

name: notes.insertAfterBlock
title: Insert After Block
description: Insert content after a block reference.

name: notes.updateFrontmatter
title: Update Frontmatter
description: Create or update a frontmatter field.

name: notes.append
title: Append To Note
description: Append content to the end of a note.

name: tags.analyze
title: Analyze Tags
description: Extract frontmatter and inline tags from a note.

name: tags.add
title: Add Tags
description: Add tags to a note frontmatter block.

name: tags.update
title: Update Tags
description: Replace or merge a note's frontmatter tags.

name: tags.remove
title: Remove Tags
description: Remove tags from frontmatter.

name: tags.search
title: Search By Tag
description: Find notes that contain a tag in frontmatter or inline content.

name: tags.list
title: List Tags
description: List unique tags used across the vault.

name: links.backlinks
title: Get Backlinks
description: Find notes that link to a target note.

name: links.outgoing
title: Get Outgoing Links
description: Extract links referenced by a note.

name: links.broken
title: Find Broken Links
description: Find broken note links in the vault or a folder.

name: links.graph
title: Get Link Graph
description: Build the vault link graph.

name: links.orphaned
title: Find Orphaned Notes
description: Find notes with no incoming or outgoing links.

name: links.hubs
title: Find Hub Notes
description: Find notes with many outgoing links.

name: links.health
title: Analyze Link Health
description: Summarize link density and broken-link metrics.

name: links.connections
title: Get Note Connections
description: Explore direct and multi-hop note connections.

name: stats.note
title: Note Statistics
description: Get statistics for a single note.

name: stats.vault
title: Vault Statistics
description: Get aggregate statistics for the whole vault.

name: tasks.search
title: Search Tasks
description: Search Tasks-plugin style markdown tasks across the vault.

name: tasks.create
title: Create Task
description: Append a task line to a note.

name: tasks.toggle
title: Toggle Task
description: Toggle a task complete/incomplete by file and line number.

name: tasks.updateMetadata
title: Update Task Metadata
description: Update task dates, priority, or recurrence in place.

name: tasks.stats
title: Task Statistics
description: Get aggregate task statistics for the vault.

name: dataview.index.read
title: Read Dataview Index
description: Read page, list-item, task, DQL, and DataviewJS metadata from a note.

name: dataview.fields.extract
title: Extract Dataview Fields
description: Extract scoped Dataview fields from a note.

name: dataview.fields.search
title: Search Dataview Fields
description: Search notes by Dataview field key and optional value.

name: dataview.fields.add
title: Add Dataview Field
description: Insert a Dataview field into a note.

name: dataview.fields.remove
title: Remove Dataview Field
description: Remove a Dataview field from a note.

name: dataview.query.read
title: Read Dataview Query Blocks
description: Extract fenced dataview DQL blocks from a note.

name: dataview.query.update
title: Update Dataview Query Block
description: Replace one fenced dataview DQL block source-preservingly.

name: dataview.js.read
title: Read DataviewJS Blocks
description: Extract fenced dataviewjs blocks from a note without executing them.

name: dataview.js.update
title: Update DataviewJS Block
description: Replace one fenced dataviewjs block source-preservingly.

name: dataview.query
title: Run Dataview Query
description: Execute a Dataview Query Language (DQL) query through the Obsidian API.

name: dataview.listByTag
title: List Notes By Tag (DQL)
description: Run a DQL LIST query for a tag.

name: dataview.listByFolder
title: List Notes By Folder (DQL)
description: Run a DQL LIST query for a folder.

name: dataview.table
title: Table Query (DQL)
description: Run a DQL TABLE query.

name: mermaid.blocks.list
title: List Mermaid Blocks
description: List fenced Mermaid blocks in a note or across the vault.

name: mermaid.blocks.read
title: Read Mermaid Block
description: Read one Mermaid block with source spans, directives, and config metadata.

name: mermaid.blocks.update
title: Update Mermaid Block
description: Replace one fenced Mermaid block source-preservingly.

name: marp.deck.read
title: Read Marp Deck
description: Read Marp deck frontmatter, slides, directives, and source spans.

name: marp.slides.list
title: List Marp Slides
description: List Marp slides with separator and directive metadata.

name: marp.slides.read
title: Read Marp Slide
description: Read one Marp slide source-preservingly.

name: marp.slides.update
title: Update Marp Slide
description: Replace one Marp slide body without rewriting neighboring slides.

name: marp.frontmatter.update
title: Update Marp Frontmatter
description: Update selected Marp deck frontmatter fields while preserving unrelated source.

name: kanban.parse
title: Parse Kanban Board
description: Parse a markdown Kanban board file.

name: kanban.addCard
title: Add Kanban Card
description: Add a card to a Kanban column.

name: kanban.moveCard
title: Move Kanban Card
description: Move a card between Kanban columns.

name: kanban.toggleCard
title: Toggle Kanban Card
description: Toggle a Kanban card complete/incomplete.

name: kanban.stats
title: Kanban Statistics
description: Get card counts and completion rates for a Kanban board.

name: templates.expand
title: Expand Template
description: Expand filesystem template variables into content.

name: templates.createNote
title: Create Note From Template
description: Create a note from a filesystem template.

name: templates.list
title: List Templates
description: List markdown templates in a folder.

name: templates.renderTemplater
title: Render Templater Template
description: Render a Templater template via the Obsidian API.

name: templates.createNoteTemplater
title: Create Note From Templater
description: Create a note from a Templater template via the Obsidian API.

name: templates.insertTemplater
title: Insert Templater Template
description: Insert a Templater template into the active note.

name: canvas.parse
title: Parse Canvas
description: Parse an Obsidian canvas file.

name: canvas.addNode
title: Add Canvas Node
description: Add a text or file node to an Obsidian canvas.

name: canvas.addEdge
title: Add Canvas Edge
description: Connect two nodes in a canvas.

name: canvas.removeNode
title: Remove Canvas Node
description: Remove a node and its edges from a canvas.

name: canvas.connections
title: Canvas Node Connections
description: Get incoming and outgoing edges for a canvas node.

name: workspace.activeFile
title: Get Active File
description: Get the currently active file in Obsidian.

name: workspace.openFile
title: Open File
description: Open a file in Obsidian.

name: workspace.closeActiveFile
title: Close Active File
description: Close the active file in Obsidian.

name: workspace.navigateBack
title: Navigate Back
description: Go back in Obsidian history.

name: workspace.navigateForward
title: Navigate Forward
description: Go forward in Obsidian history.

name: workspace.toggleEditMode
title: Toggle Edit Mode
description: Toggle edit/preview mode in Obsidian.

name: commands.execute
title: Execute Command
description: Execute an Obsidian command by ID.

name: commands.list
title: List Commands
description: List all available Obsidian commands.

name: commands.search
title: Search Commands
description: Search Obsidian commands by ID or name.

name: wiki.init
title: Initialize Wiki
description: Scaffold the wiki layout: Sources/, Concepts/, Entities/ folders plus seed index.md, log.md, and wiki-schema.md. Idempotent; use force:true to re-seed index/log/schema files.

name: wiki.ingest
title: Ingest Source
description: File a new source into the wiki: create Sources/<slug>.md with canonical frontmatter, append a log entry, and return proposedEdits for index + related concept/entity pages for the LLM to apply via notes.update.

name: wiki.logAppend
title: Append Wiki Log Entry
description: Append a typed chronological entry to the wiki log using the convention '## [YYYY-MM-DD] <op> | <title>'. Initializes the wiki if needed.

name: wiki.indexRebuild
title: Rebuild Wiki Index
description: Regenerate the wiki index.md from the current state of Sources/, Concepts/, and Entities/. Groups entries by category; supports optional per-category counts.

name: wiki.query
title: Query Wiki
description: Rank wiki pages relevant to a topic using filename, alias, tag, summary and body hits. Returns the top pages so the LLM can drill in with notes.read.

name: wiki.lint
title: Lint Wiki
description: Health-check the wiki: orphans, broken links, stale sources, missing concept pages, singleton tags, and index.md parity. Read-only; returns grouped findings with totals.

name: wiki.summaryMerge
title: Merge Summary Into Concept Or Entity Page
description: Add a cited section into an existing concept or entity page (or create the page with canonical frontmatter if missing). Bumps 'updated' on existing pages.
